speaker: Ren
text: Where is she?! Tell me she's okay or I swear—

speaker: Solen
text: She is safe. She fights in the past — a time that still holds against the darkness. You, however, stand in what comes after.

speaker: Ren
text: After what? What happened to this place?

speaker: Solen
text: The Demon King happened. He split time itself — past from future — so that no force could unite against him. This wasteland is his legacy.

speaker: Ren
text: The Demon King... so he's the one who dragged us here?

speaker: Solen
text: He tore the world apart, and you were caught in the fracture. But that is also why you can end this. You and Mira — bound across time.

speaker: Solen
text: His throne lies where past and future converge. Press forward. Cross the bridge ahead, and the path to Mira — and to him — will reveal itself.

speaker: Ren
text: ...Fine. But if anything happens to her, this world won't be the only thing that's broken.
